input_messages.content: {"suggestions": ["Segment the network using VLANs or ACLs on network switches to restrict and isolate ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to sensitive network segments", "Deploy additional Snort IPS devices inline at key network chokepoints (e.g., between routers or firewalls) to enhance intrusion detection and prevention coverage", "Implement host-based application whitelisting or strict outbound firewall policies on UbuntuComputer to restrict ICMP utility usage and prevent flood generation"], "chosen_mitigation": "Segment the network using VLANs or ACLs on network switches to restrict and isolate ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to sensitive network segments", "no_mitigation_left": false, "current_mitigations_counter": 7, "reached_mitigation_limit": false}

response.content:
{
  "mitigation_currently_implemented": "Segment the network using VLANs or ACLs on network switches to restrict and isolate ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to sensitive network segments",
  "comments": "Configured VLAN 10 on ports Gi1/0 of Cisco Switch 1 and Cisco Switch 2, isolating the network segments and restricting ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to other sensitive parts of the network. This segmentation helps contain the impact of the ICMP flood attack by limiting the attacker's traffic scope and reduces risk to critical network resources while the attacker remains active in the network.",
  "device_identifier": "cisco-switch-1 and cisco-switch-2",
  "commands": [
    "conf t on cisco-switch-1",
    "interface Gi1/0 on cisco-switch-1",
    "switchport mode access on cisco-switch-1",
    "switchport access vlan 10 on cisco-switch-1",
    "conf t on cisco-switch-2",
    "interface Gi1/0 on cisco-switch-2",
    "switchport mode access on cisco-switch-2",
    "switchport access vlan 10 on cisco-switch-2"
  ]
}{
  "mitigation_currently_implemented": "Segment the network using VLANs or ACLs on network switches to restrict and isolate ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to sensitive network segments",
  "comments": "Configured VLAN 10 access mode on interface Gi1/0 for both Cisco Switch 1 and Cisco Switch 2. This creates logical segmentation on these switch ports, isolating traffic and restricting ICMP traffic from the compromised UbuntuComputer to sensitive network segments. This network segmentation mitigates ICMP flood impact by limiting traffic scope in the network, protecting critical assets while the attacker remains active.",
  "device_identifier": "cisco-switch-1 and cisco-switch-2",
  "commands": [

    "switchport mode access",

    "conf t on cisco-switch-2",
    "interface Gi1/0",
    "switchport mode access",
    "switchport access vlan 10"
  ]
}
